en: And the why, the why, we talked about this.
ko: 그리고 왜, 왜, 우리는 이 얘기를 했어요.

en: It's an I in happiness.
There's no why in happiness, it's an I.
I told you I don't speak English.
I'm Chris Gardner.
I met my father for the first time when I was 28 years old,
and I made up my mind as a young kid
that when I had children,
my children were gonna know who their father was.
ko: 내 아이들은 아버지가 누구인지 알게 될 거라고.

en: This is part of my life story.
This part is called riding the bus.
ko: 이 부분은 버스를 타는 것에 관한 거예요.

en: What's that?
It's a time machine, isn't it?
Seems like a time machine.
That seems like a time machine.
It's a time machine. Take me with you.
This machine, this machine on my lap...
ko: 이 기계, 내 무릎 위에 있는 이 기계...

en: This guy, he has a time machine.
He travels, he travels in the past with this machine.
It is not a time machine.
It's a portable bone density scanner.
